creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
FLAVOR starts getting annoying with errors really mystical. print/hplip reject to be updated with the error below:

===>  hplip-3.17.11 FLAVOR is defined (to py27) while this port does not have
FLAVORS..
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/print/hplip
